case_title: MOHAMED MUBIN SHAIKH VS. UNGER THOMAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2008 - JUDGMENT. THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1718.55 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND LOSS OF USE; AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SHAIKH, MOHAMED MUBIN AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, UNGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK M. SCHWARTZ-SCOTT; NOT REPORTED (506) EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR BOTH SIDES. ALL PARTIES PRESENT.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, MOHAMED MUBIN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, UNGER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $30.00) SERVED NOV-13-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, UNGER
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, UNGER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-24-2007 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-14-2008 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, MOHAMED MUBIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, UNGER $859.26 PRINCIPAL, $82.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $941.76, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1718.55 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND LOSS OF USE; AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
